# livePhoto

**Instance Property**

The unedited Live Photo content of the editing input.

## Declaration

```swift
var livePhoto: PHLivePhoto? { get }
```

## Discussion

To edit the video and photo content of the Live Photo, create a [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext] object using this [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHContentEditingInput] object.

If the editing input does not represent a Live Photo, this property’s value is `nil`, indicating that you cannot use this [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHContentEditingInput] object to create a Live Photo editing context.

## Working with Live Photo Assets

- **playbackStyle**: The style in which to present this content to the user.
- **PHAsset.PlaybackStyle**: An enumeration of asset playback styles that dictate how to present an asset to the user.
